_meta.description: TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) calculation formulas and activity multipliers
_meta.note: All weights in kg, heights in cm unless otherwise noted

mifflin_st_jeor.name: Mifflin-St Jeor (1990)
mifflin_st_jeor.citation: Mifflin MD et al. A new predictive equation for resting energy expenditure in healthy individuals. Am J Clin Nutr. 1990;51(2):241-7.
mifflin_st_jeor.accuracy_note: Most validated for general population; ±10% accuracy

harris_benedict_revised.name: Harris-Benedict Revised — Roza & Shizgal (1984)
harris_benedict_revised.citation: Roza AM, Shizgal HM. The Harris Benedict equation reevaluated: resting energy requirements and the body cell mass. Am J Clin Nutr. 1984;40(1):168-82.
harris_benedict_revised.accuracy_note: Tends to overestimate by ~5% in sedentary adults

katch_mcardle.name: Katch-McArdle (Lean Mass Based)
katch_mcardle.recommended: for athletes or individuals with known body fat %
katch_mcardle.citation: McArdle WD, Katch FI, Katch VL. Exercise Physiology: Energy, Nutrition, and Human Performance.
katch_mcardle.accuracy_note: Most accurate when lean body mass is known via DEXA or skinfold measurement

activity_multipliers.source: Standard values derived from Ainsworth et al. Compendium of Physical Activities

levels.label: Sedentary
levels.label_zh: 久坐 (辦公室工作，幾乎不運動)

levels.label: Lightly Active
levels.label_zh: 輕度活動 (每週運動 1–3 天)

levels.label: Moderately Active
levels.label_zh: 中度活動 (每週運動 3–5 天)

levels.label: Very Active
levels.label_zh: 高度活動 (每週重度訓練 6–7 天)

levels.label: Extremely Active
levels.label_zh: 超高度活動 (運動員或勞力工作者)
levels.description: Very hard exercise, physical job, or twice-daily training

minimum_calorie_floor.note: Do not go below these values without medical supervision. Values below 1200 kcal (F) / 1500 kcal (M) significantly increase risk of nutrient deficiency and metabolic adaptation.
